name: aifinpay
description: Stripe for AI agents. Pay for any HTTP API in stablecoins or native tokens on Polygon and Solana mainnet with one MCP call. Non-custodial, on-chain settlement.

env.AIFINPAY_AGENT_SECRET: base58 Ed25519 secret (persistent agent identity; Solana + EVM addresses both derive from it)
env.AIFINPAY_MAX_USD: hard cap per paid call (agent_call + payable_fetch), default 0.10
env.AIFINPAY_BASE_URL: override the AiFinPay backend endpoint, default https://aifinpay.io

tools.name: agent_call
tools.description: Registry-resolved paid call to a named provider (exa, io-net, venice, ...). Settles on-chain, returns the upstream response + tx hash.

tools.name: agent_claim_self
tools.description: Attach this agent to a user's AiFinPay account via magic-link + key signature.

tools.name: payable_fetch
tools.description: Fetch any URL; auto-settle 402 on-chain and retry. Returns the gated response body.

tools.name: agent_address
tools.description: Return the agent's wallet addresses (Polygon + Solana, for funding).

tools.name: agent_quote
tools.description: Get a price quote for a 402-gated endpoint without paying.

tools.name: pay_with_split
tools.description: On-chain instructions for a payment through the splitter contract for B2B endpoints (atomic fee-on-top split).

tools.name: quote_split
tools.description: Pure-view fee breakdown for an atomic split payment.
